stemHtml: One of the main differences between Mode A/C transponders and Mode S transponders is that Mode S transponders have a...

options.a: Unique address code based on the aircraft which is approved by ICAO.
options.b: Unique address code based on the flight plan.
options.c: A 4-digit Mode A code based on the flight plan.
options.d: A 4-digit Mode A code based on the aircraft registration.
